page_metadata.biotools__summary: Caserel (Computer-aided Segmentation of Retinal Layers in Optical Coherence Tomography Images) os an open-source software suite for computer-aided segmentation of retinal layers in optical coherence tomography (OCT) images written in Matlab.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Caserel (Computer-aided Segmentation of Retinal Layers in Optical Coherence Tomography Images) os an open-source software suite for computer-aided segmentation of retinal layers in optical coherence tomography (OCT) images written in Matlab.
